jd_text: Job Summary The Senior SAP S/4HANA Finance Tester will be responsible for planning, designing, and executing comprehensive testing activities for SAP S/4HANA Finance (FICO) solutions. The role focuses on validating end‑to‑end finance processes, integrations, and data accuracy to ensure business readiness and solution quality. The tester will work closely with functional consultants, developers, and business stakeholders to identify defects early, manage risks, and support successful delivery of the S/4HANA transformation programme. Airline Industry experience an advantage. Responsibilities Lead SIT and UAT testing for SAP S/4HANA Finance modules (FI, CO, and integrations) Design and execute standalone, integration, and end‑to‑end finance test scenarios Validate GL, AP, AR, Asset Accounting, Costing, and Financial Close processes Perform data validation and reconciliation post‑migration from ECC to S/4HANA Manage defect lifecycle including logging, retesting, and closure Support test planning, reporting, and quality gate sign‑offs Participate in and support client interviews
